offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes inaccuracies in financial reporting. We simplify expense report generation instead of manual expense tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Manual tracking of expenses leads to inaccuracies and time loss.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try Monthly report generation and Expense categorization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
